query:
SELECT serialNumber,
       COUNT(*) AS total_rows,
       SUM(CASE WHEN poNumber IS NULL OR TRIM(poNumber) = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rows_without_po,
       SUM(CASE WHEN vendorName IS NULL OR TRIM(vendorName) = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rows_without_vendor,
       GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(id, ':', COALESCE(poNumber,'NULL'), ':', COALESCE(batchNo,'NULL')) ORDER BY id DESC SEPARATOR ' | ') AS row_summary
FROM products
WHERE archivedAt IS NULL
  AND serialNumber IN ('G0NCX7JVN735', 'C6KZLKJTN73D', '10AFAS1NEZ002GL', 'add33c0b')
GROUP BY serialNumber
ORDER BY total_rows DESC, serialNumber ASC;

       SUM(CASE WHEN poNumber IS NULL OR TRIM(poNumber) = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rows_without_po,
       SUM(CASE WHEN vendorName IS NULL OR TRIM(vendorName) = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rows_without_vendor,
       GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(id, ':', COALESCE(poNumber,'NULL'), ':', COALESCE(batchNo,'NULL')) ORDER BY id DESC SEPARATOR ' | ') AS row_summary

  AND serialNumber IN ('G0NCX7JVN735', 'C6KZLKJTN73D', '10AFAS1NEZ002GL', 'add33c0b')
